meaning: 索科特拉岛[也门](在阿拉伯海西南部)
examples: On the dunes of Socotra island, Yemen.
Its territory includes the island of Socotra, about 350 km to the south.
It vanished behind the dunes, leaving me with this picture and the most awe-inspiring memories of Socotra.
But the reality is that, without proper environmental policing, Socotra is ripe for exploitation.
When the British colonised Aden, 880km (550 miles) to the west, they paid scant attention to Socotra.
